description: Gametime is a ticketing service focused on last-minute event tickets. The `gteng.co` domain appears to host Gametime engineering infrastructure, including an MCP endpoint.
summary: gteng.co exposes a public MCP server for Gametime - Last Minute Tickets at `https://mcp-v1-1.labs.production.gteng.co/mcp`; no other public developer integration surfaces were found.

surfaces.name: Gametime - Last Minute Tickets MCP Server
